title: Social Housing Innovation Fund: prospectus
body: "The prospectus includes:   a summary of key information about the grant the grant’s objectives who can apply for the grant the amount of funding available assessment criteria timeline   To apply for funding, you must complete the application form.   3 December 2025: Prospectus updated to reflect the increase in overall funding available from £1 million to £2 million. Applicants can now bid for up to £120,000, and the fund will support 15-30 projects.  "
